query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `broker_filings` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `userId` int NOT NULL,
  `dotNumber` varchar(32),
  `mcNumber` varchar(32),
  `legalName` varchar(512) NOT NULL,
  `dbaName` varchar(512),
  `contactName` varchar(256),
  `contactEmail` varchar(320),
  `contactPhone` varchar(64),
  `phyStreet` varchar(512),
  `phyCity` varchar(128),
  `phyState` varchar(64),
  `phyZip` varchar(16),
  `filingType` enum('new','renewal','reinstatement') NOT NULL,
  `authorityType` enum('broker','carrier','freight_forwarder','broker_carrier') DEFAULT 'broker',
  `authorityStatus` enum('active','pending','revoked','inactive','not_authorized') DEFAULT 'pending',
  `filingDate` bigint,
  `effectiveDate` bigint,
  `insuranceRequired` boolean DEFAULT true,
  `bondSuretyName` varchar(256),
  `bondAmount` int,
  `processedStatus` enum('pending','prospect_created','campaign_enrolled','skipped') DEFAULT 'pending',
  `prospectId` int,
  `campaignId` int,
  `scanBatchId` varchar(64),
  `rawData` json,
  `notes` text,
  `createdAt` bigint NOT NULL,
  `updatedAt` bigint NOT NULL,
  CONSTRAINT `broker_filings_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);
